description: Using the 'BFI25.csv' dataset in Jamovi, analyze the relationship between age, gender, and neuroticism. Create a computed variable 'Neuroticism_Mean' representing the average of items N1, N2, N3, N4, and N5. With 'gender' as a nominal variable and 'age' as a continuous variable, perform a linear regression where 'Neuroticism_Mean' is the dependent variable, 'age' is a covariate, and 'gender' is a factor. Ensure 95% confidence intervals are calculated. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/NeuroticismAnalysis.omv and export the unstandardized coefficient for Age and its 95% confidence interval bounds (lower and upper) to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/regression_results.txt.
